vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes the permissions of /etc/group to the standard 0644 mode. This is a simple file permission adjustment that does not affect service operation or access methods, making it low risk and straightforward to apply.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Incorrect permissions could expose group information; Improper permissions might interfere with applications that expect default mode
